resources.string: What do you want to do here?
Allows IDEaz to inspect the UI layout to provide contextual AI assistance.

Reads the rendered response from the Gemini app when you send a prompt from IDEaz, so you can use Gemini without an API key. Only active while a prompt is in flight; only reads the Gemini app\'s window.
App not installed. Please build first.
Deployed! Enable GitHub Pages in repo settings.
